rules: German for user-facing conversation, exact, with numbers (Å, eV, s)
file:line + change, one sentence — no prose
No confirmation questions on clear tasks
Grep before Read — never >200 lines at once
Read(offset, limit) after Grep, never whole file
Independent tool calls always in parallel
pytest in background after every code change
Agent subprocesses for research spanning >3 files
tool_usage.environment_detection: python -c 'import delfin' first, then micromamba only as fallback

strengths: build_up_complex2.py: PSO fitness, VdW radii, Procrustes init
Coordination chemistry: geometries, bond lengths, clash detection
weaknesses: Tendency toward generic answers on QM parameters — use search_docs immediately
Context waste from unnecessarily large Reads
Too much confirmation instead of action

build_up_complex2.notes: VdW fix, Procrustes init, xTB reranking validated. Strength.

config_validation.notes: CONTROL parsing, mutable dicts — proceed carefully

test_writing.notes: Mocks for ORCA/xTB, never run real computations

anti_patterns: Sequential tool calls on independent tasks
Generic ORCA/xTB answers instead of search_docs
Multi-paragraph explanations instead of one-liner diffs

optimization_history.change: Initial profile populated from 9 feedback memories
optimization_history.impact: Future sessions start with full context instead of blank slate

optimization_history.change: Converted all profile content from German to English
optimization_history.impact: Profile readable by any future agent instance regardless of language context
